summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for French welding training website. All core functionality working perfectly including hash-based routing, filterable tables, expandable sessions, YouTube embeds, mobile responsiveness, and sparks animation.

design_issues.issue: Minor overlay interference with some click interactions

passed_tests: Home page loads with hero section, sparks animation (30 elements), navigation cards
Sidebar navigation works - all 15 nav items functional with proper hash routing
Hash-based routing works (#securite, #smaw, #migmag, #tig, etc.) - URLs update correctly
Securite page displays 9 EPI items with detailed safety information
SMAW page shows parameter tables (6 rows) and defauts table (6 rows)
MIG/MAG page shows gas comparison and parameter tables
TIG page shows tungsten types and parameter tables
Tables page has 4 filterable/searchable tables (SMAW, MIG/MAG, TIG, Defauts) - filtering works correctly
Module SIGMA page has 10 expandable session cards using details/summary elements
Back to top button appears on scroll and functions correctly
Reading progress bar element exists and positioned correctly
YouTube video embeds load correctly on all 4 pages (Securite, SMAW, MIG/MAG, TIG)
Mobile menu toggle button exists and functions on mobile viewport
Direct hash navigation works for all routes (#securite, #smaw, #tables, #sigma)
All pages have proper data-testid attributes for robust testing
Dark industrial theme (#0f1012 background, #e8823a amber accents) implemented perfectly
Mobile responsive layout works on 390x844 viewport
No JavaScript errors or console errors found

success_percentage.backend: N/A - Static site with no backend APIs
